description: Pins the config-update PUT body plus Go's at-least-one-field/port/check/ssl body validation now ported to Python (strictest-wins). Rejection cases set confirm:true so both languages reach the body check despite the confirm-vs-body ordering difference.

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This updates a NodeBalancer config. Set confirm=true to proceed.

cases.name: requires at least one update field
cases.expect_error: at least one update field is required

cases.name: rejects an out-of-range port
cases.expect_error: port must be an integer from 1 through 65535

cases.name: rejects an invalid check
cases.expect_error: check must be one of: none, connection, http, http_body

cases.name: requires ssl_cert and ssl_key for https
cases.expect_error: ssl_cert and ssl_key are required when protocol is https
